home.title: Fuel additive solutions for demanding industrial markets
home.summary: Huanyu Kuntai Chemical builds a Directus-ready multilingual B2B website for fuel additives and industrial chemical products.
home.capabilitiesTitle: Built for product clarity and inquiry conversion
home.capabilitiesText: The site structure is prepared for CMS-managed products, technical articles, applications, SEO, and inquiries.
home.capabilityFuelText: Product routes are ready for diesel, gasoline, and industrial fuel additive categories.
home.capabilityChemicalText: Directus collections will hold multilingual product specifications, descriptions, and image alt text.
home.capabilityQualityText: Service, application, and contact pages guide buyers from evaluation to inquiry.

products.intro: Browse CMS-managed product categories and product detail pages.

news.intro: Technical articles and company news will be managed through Directus.

about.intro: Company profile content must be finalized in the project memory and Directus before production publication.

applications.intro: Application content will connect product use cases with target buyer scenarios.

service.intro: Service content will explain consultation, sampling, documentation, logistics, and after-sales support.

contact.intro: Send product requirements, target application, and destination market for a quotation.
